text: Coach-led training, enhanced by smart tooling
Coach-led training plans with an optional Instant AI flow. Clear, structured, and built for real progress.
Choose a coach and submit your training request.
Generate a plan in minutes when you need speed.
One balance you can use across both flows.
Receive and track your plan in your dashboard
We focus on clear, actionable guidance instead of marketing fluff.
Training guidance is informational and should be used responsibly.
Coaches provide personalized guidance and help you stay on track.
We value efficiency and deliver plans that fit your schedule.
Training guidance is informational and should be used responsibly. If you have a condition or injury, consult a qualified professional.

Athletes demonstrating perfect form with resistance bands
Cat–camel ×6, Hip hinge drill ×8, Ankle rocks ×8/side, Shoulder circles ×10.
Banded Good Morning — hip hinge focus (hamstrings/glutes)
Mini-band Lateral Walk — pelvis level, toes forward
Banded Chest Press (standing) — staggered stance, ribs down
Banded Row (anchored) — elbows low-to-mid, squeeze back
DB Goblet Hold March — core brace, slow steps
Shadow boxing: 3×40 s on / 20 s off (low impact).
Couch stretch 45 s/side, Hamstring stretch 45 s/side, Box breathing 1 min.
Add 1 round or increase tension by 10–15%.
without Knee Pain — Hinges & Hip Thrusts
Wants strong glutes with minimal knee stress
Gym or home with a bench
Hip airplanes (assisted) ×4/side, Cat–camel ×6, Band external rotations ×12.
Barbell or DB Hip Thrust — 4×8–10, rest 90 s
Cues: posterior pelvic tilt at top, chin tucked, shins near vertical.
Cues: long spine, push hips back, feel hamstrings.
Alt home: Prone hip extension (pillow under hips).
Mini-band Abduction (standing or side-lying) — 3×15/side, rest 45 s
EMOM ×4: 20 s glute bridge hold + 40 s rest.
Piriformis stretch 45 s/side, Hamstring stretch 45 s/side, Box breathing 1 min.
Increase the weight in thrust/RDL by 2–5 kg or add 1 set to back extension.
← Previous: TRX Posture Reset — Back & Core for desk workers
Home workout setup for knee-safe training
Cat–camel × 6, Hip hinge drill × 8, Ankle rocks × 8/side, Glute bridge × 10 (easy)
Cues: sit back, shins near vertical, light touch, drive up.
Alt (easier): Sit-to-stand. Alt (harder): Goblet box squat.
Cues: ribs down, long spine, push hips back, feel hamstrings.
Step-back Split Squat (short ROM) — 3×8/side, rest 75 s
Cues: small stance, tap pad/stacked books as depth limiter.
Alt: Static split squat with hands on support.
Cues: soft knees, pelvis level, toes forward.
EMOM ×4: 20 s Marching high knees + 40 s easy walk (low impact).
Couch stretch 1 min/side, Hamstring stretch 45 s/side, Breathing 1 min.
+1–2 reps Box Squat and RDL or +2–4 kg in total.
Home workout setup for knee-safe training
Athletes demonstrating perfect form with resistance bands
TRX row exercise demonstrating precision and form
Latest insights on fitness, AI training, and wellness.
Practical tips and alternatives to keep your knees happy while training legs at home or in the gym.
High-intensity interval training using only resistance bands for joint-friendly cardio and strength.
TRX Posture Reset — Back & Core for desk workers
Reset your posture and strengthen back/core muscles using TRX suspension training.
Glute Power without Knee Pain — Hinges & Hip Thrusts
Build powerful glutes with minimal knee stress using hip hinges and thrust movements.
TRX row exercise demonstrating precision and form
Thoracic rotations ×6/side, Scapular wall slides ×8, Glute bridges ×10.
Cues: shoulders down-and-back, ribs stacked, squeeze mid-back.
Cues: long arms, avoid shrug, thumbs up.
Cues: heels heavy in straps, posterior tilt, slow eccentrics.
20 s high-arm march + 40 s easy breathing ×4.
Pec doorway stretch 45 s/side, Long spine decompression 60 s, Nasal breathing 1 min.
Reduce the angle of your body during TRX exercises (more difficult) or add 1 set.
← Previous: Bands-only HIIT — 30-min low-impact fat burn (Home)

Coach-led and Instant AI training flows
Coach requests are personalized plans created by certified coaches based on your specific goals and preferences. Instant AI plans are generated automatically in minutes using AI technology.
Both options use tokens from your balance, but coach requests offer human expertise and personalized guidance, while Instant AI provides immediate results.
They never expire. Use them whenever you are ready.
Yes — a single token balance covers coach-built plans and AI-generated ones.
You will be asked to top up before continuing. Head to the Pricing page to add more tokens at any time.
With Instant AI, you can preview a plan for 50 tokens before deciding to publish the full version.
Everything is in your Dashboard — coach plans, AI plans, downloads, and progress tracking.
Tell your coach your goal and preferences. Your plan is tailored to your request.
Generate a plan in minutes. Preview first, then publish when ready.

This Cookies Policy explains how CHALET AQUARIUS LTD ("Company", "we", "us", "our") uses cookies and similar tracking technologies on our website chaletcoaching.co.uk (the "Site") and our fitness coaching dashboard.
This policy should be read alongside our Privacy Policy.

Cookies are small text files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently, to secure user accounts, and to provide information to the owners of the site.
We also use similar technologies such as:
Allows us to store data (like your current Token Balance cache or selected currency) locally on your browser so you don't lose them if you refresh the page.
Small graphic files that allow us to monitor the use of our website and the effectiveness of our courses.

We use cookies to facilitate your access to the fitness dashboard, manage the Token payment system, process transactions in multiple currencies (GBP, EUR, USD), and ensure the security of your Account.

These are vital for the Site to function. Without them, we cannot provide the services you request, such as logging into your secure Dashboard, maintaining your session while you navigate between courses, or processing a secure payment via Visa/Mastercard.
We do not require your consent for these cookies as the site cannot function without them.
These allow the Site to remember choices you make to provide a more personalized experience.
Remembering your preferred currency (e.g., switching prices from GBP to USD), your language setting, or keeping your "AI Course" inputs saved while you purchase Tokens.

These help us understand how users interact with our Site (e.g., which workout plans are most popular, how long users stay on the dashboard). We use this data to fix errors and improve the speed of our platform.
We request your consent before setting these cookies, unless the data is strictly anonymized.

These cookies record your visit to our Site, the pages you have visited, and the links you have followed. We may use this information to make our Site and the offers displayed on it more relevant to your fitness interests.
Below is a non-exhaustive list of the types of storage keys we typically use:
Identifies your active session so you stay logged in to the Dashboard.
Remembers if you selected GBP, EUR, or USD prices.
Stores your selected Token Package in the cart.
Google Analytics cookies to measure site traffic.
Stores your preference regarding this Cookie Policy (Accepted/Rejected).
Please note that third parties may also use cookies, over which we have no control. These third parties include:
When you pay for Tokens via Visa or MasterCard, the payment gateway (e.g., Stripe, WorldPay) may set cookies to detect fraud, prevent money laundering, and secure the transaction.
We use services like Google Analytics to track aggregate user behavior.
If you use buttons to share your progress on social media, those platforms may set their own cookies.
You have the right to choose whether or not to accept non-essential cookies.
When you first visit our Site, a banner will appear asking for your consent. You can choose to "Accept All" or "Manage Settings".
You can block cookies by activating the setting on your browser that allows you to refuse the setting of all or some cookies.
If you use your browser settings to block all cookies (including essential cookies), you may not be able to access your Dashboard, purchase Tokens, or download your PDF courses.
To learn more about managing cookies, visit www.allaboutcookies.org.

Some of our third-party partners (e.g., analytics providers) may process data outside the UK or EEA. In such cases, we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place in compliance with the UK GDPR and PECR.
We may update this Cookies Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated "Effective Date".
If you have any questions about how we use cookies, please contact us:

CHALET AQUARIUS LTD ("Company", "we", "us", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy and the sensitive personal information you entrust to us. This Privacy Policy outlines how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your personal data when you use our website chaletcoaching.co.uk and our fitness coaching platform (the "Service").
We act as the Data Controller for the personal data you provide to us directly.
By using the Service, purchasing Tokens, or requesting a fitness plan, you acknowledge the terms of this Policy. This Service is strictly intended for users aged 18 and over.
We collect data necessary to generate personalized fitness plans, process Token payments, and deliver digital content.
Your name, email address, phone number, and secure password.
To create effective AI or Trainer-led fitness plans, we collect sensitive data including, but not limited to:
Fitness goals (e.g., weight loss, muscle gain).
Current fitness level and lifestyle habits.
Physical limitations or past injuries (to ensure safety).
By submitting this information, you provide Explicit Consent for us to process this data solely for the purpose of generating your workout plan.
Details of Token package purchases, payment history, and current Token balance. We do not store full credit card numbers.
Records of your correspondence with our support team or chat history with Trainers.
IP address, browser type and version, time zone setting, operating system, and device type.
Information about how you navigate our dashboard, download courses, and utilize the Token system.
Small data files stored on your device to maintain your login session and preferences.
We process your personal data under the UK GDPR and Data Protection Act 2018 based on the following legal grounds:
To manage your User Account and Token Wallet.
To deliver the purchased PDF courses to your email and dashboard.
To process payments via our payment processors (Visa/Mastercard).

To process your Health and Physical Data for the specific purpose of generating a workout routine. You may withdraw this consent at any time by deleting your account, but this will prevent us from providing further services.
To maintain financial records for tax and accounting purposes (HMRC compliance).
To prevent fraud and money laundering.
To improve our AI algorithms and website functionality.
To send strictly operational emails (e.g., "Course Ready for Download", "Password Reset").
To provide our services, we may share your data with trusted third parties. We require all third parties to respect the security of your personal data and to treat it in accordance with the law.
If you purchase a "Trainer Course," we share your Physical & Health Data with the specific human trainer assigned to your order so they can compile your PDF plan.
If you purchase an "AI Course," your anonymized or pseudonymized metrics are processed by our AI algorithms to generate the content instantly.
We use secure third-party payment gateways to process Visa/Mastercard transactions. They process your financial data independently.
Cloud hosting services (to store your PDF files securely), email delivery services (to send your plans), and IT support.
Accountants and lawyers for legal and financial compliance.
We do NOT sell your personal data to advertisers.
Our servers and third-party service providers (e.g., cloud hosting) may be located outside the UK or the European Economic Area (EEA).
If we transfer your data out of the UK, we ensure a similar degree of protection is afforded to it by ensuring at least one of the following safeguards is implemented:
The country is deemed to provide an adequate level of protection; or
We use specific contracts approved by the UK Information Commissioner's Office (ICO) regarding personal data protection (Standard Contractual Clauses).
We retain your personal data only as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes we collected it for:
Retained while your account is active to allow you to download past courses. If you delete your account, this data is anonymized or erased within 30 days.
Kept for 6 years to comply with UK tax laws.
Retained for audit purposes as long as the account exists.
Under the UK GDPR, you have the right to:
Request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.
Request correction of inaccurate data (e.g., updating your weight or email).
Request deletion of your data (subject to our legal tax obligations).
Request transfer of your data to you or another provider.
To exercise these rights, please contact us at info@chaletcoaching.co.uk.
We implement robust security measures to prevent your personal data from being accidentally lost, used, or accessed in an unauthorized way.
We use SSL/TLS encryption for all data in transit.
Access to your Health Data is restricted to employees and trainers who have a direct business need to know.
Files stored in the dashboard are protected by authentication protocols.

Our website may contain links to third-party websites. Clicking on those links may allow third parties to collect data about you. We do not control these third-party websites and are not responsible for their privacy statements.

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The new version will be posted on this page with an updated "Effective Date". Continued use of the Service constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your health data, please contact:

This Refund and Return Policy ("Policy") governs the cancellation of orders, refund requests for Token packages, and disputes regarding digital content provided by CHALET AQUARIUS LTD (Company No: 15587263).
By purchasing Tokens or exchanging them for Fitness Courses on chaletcoaching.co.uk, you agree to the terms outlined below. This Policy operates in conjunction with our Terms and Conditions.
Tokens are the virtual currency used to access our services. The refund of real currency (Fiat) for Token packages is subject to strict conditions.
You have the right to request a full refund for a purchased Token Package within 14 days of the transaction date, provided that:
None of the Tokens from that specific package have been used or exchanged for a Course.
The transaction has settled and is not subject to a payment dispute.
Once you have used any portion of a Token Package (e.g., purchasing a Single Course using tokens from the "Momentum Pack"), the entire package is deemed "activated" and used.
No partial refunds will be issued for the remaining balance of Tokens in a package.
This policy ensures the integrity of our bulk-pricing model.

For eligible monetary refunds, we reserve the right to deduct a processing fee (typically 3-5%) to cover the merchant fees (Visa/Mastercard) and administrative costs incurred during the original transaction and the refund process.
This section governs the return of Tokens to your account balance, not the return of money to your bank account.
Due to the nature of this service:
AI Courses are generated and delivered instantly (or within minutes) upon purchase.
Once you click "Buy" or "Generate," the service is fully performed.
Tokens cannot be returned once the generation process has started.
These courses require manual work by a human professional.
If you wish to cancel a Trainer Course before the Trainer has started working on it (status is "Pending"), you may contact support. If approved, Tokens will be returned to your Dashboard balance.
Once the Trainer has begun compiling your plan or the file has been sent/uploaded, the service is deemed commenced. No cancellation or Token refund is possible.
Under UK and EU consumer law, you typically have a 14-day "cooling-off" period. However, this does not apply to digital content once the download or streaming has begun.
By purchasing a Course and initiating the download (or receiving it via email), you expressly acknowledge that you lose your right of withdrawal.
We provide educational fitness plans. We do not guarantee specific physical results (e.g., weight loss, muscle gain).
Dissatisfaction with the difficulty, style, or effectiveness of the workout plan is not valid grounds for a refund.
If a purchased PDF file is corrupted, blank, or technically inaccessible:
You must contact info@chaletcoaching.co.uk within 48 hours of purchase.
We will attempt to provide a replacement file free of charge.
If we cannot provide a working file, the Tokens used for that specific order will be refunded to your Account.
If you spent Tokens but did not receive the Course in your Dashboard or Email:
Please check your Spam/Junk folder first.
Contact support immediately. If the system failed to deliver the product, we will manually send the file or refund the Tokens.

Where a monetary refund is approved (under Section 2), it will be processed strictly to the original payment method used (Visa or MasterCard). We cannot issue refunds to third-party accounts or via cash.
Refunds typically take 5–10 business days to appear on your bank statement, depending on your card issuer's processing times.
We transact in GBP, EUR, and USD.
If your bank account is in a different currency, your bank may apply exchange rates.

We refund the exact amount charged in the transaction currency. We are not liable for any difference in the refund amount caused by exchange rate fluctuations between the purchase date and refund date.
If you initiate a payment dispute (Chargeback) with your bank without first contacting our support team to resolve the issue:
Your Account and access to all purchased Courses will be suspended immediately.
We will submit this Policy, your access logs, and download records to the bank as evidence that the digital service was delivered.
We reserve the right to ban your IP address and device from future use of our Service.
To request a refund or report a technical issue, please include your User ID and Order Reference and contact us at:

These Terms and Conditions ("Terms") constitute a legally binding agreement between CHALET AQUARIUS LTD ("Company", "we", "us", "our"), a company registered in England and Wales (Company Number: 15587263), with its registered office at 20 Wenlock Road, London, England, N1 7GU, and you ("User", "Customer", "you"), the individual accessing our website chaletcoaching.co.uk (the "Site") or purchasing our fitness content and services (the "Service").

By registering an account, purchasing Tokens, or downloading any fitness course (PDF), you expressly agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, you must cease using the Service immediately.

You acknowledge that CHALET AQUARIUS LTD provides digital fitness educational content. We offer fitness courses generated by Artificial Intelligence ("AI Courses") and courses compiled by human trainers ("Trainer Courses"). All content is provided in digital format (PDF) and is accessed via the Site dashboard or email.
The registered user profile on the chaletcoaching.co.uk platform.
The internal virtual currency/credits used solely within the Site to purchase Courses. Tokens have no monetary value outside of our Service.
The digital fitness guide (PDF) purchased by the User, which may be AI-generated or Trainer-created.
The private area of the Site where Users can manage their Tokens and download purchased content.
A human fitness professional engaged by the Company to create specific workout plans.
Artificial Intelligence algorithms used to generate instant fitness plans based on User inputs.

You must be at least 18 years old to use the Service. By creating an account, you represent and warrant that you meet this age requirement and have the legal capacity to enter into a binding contract.

You agree to provide current, complete, and accurate information regarding your physical metrics and goals when requesting a Course. Inaccurate data may lead to ineffective or unsuitable workout plans.

You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials. CHALET AQUARIUS LTD is not liable for any loss (including loss of Tokens) arising from unauthorized access to your Account.
Services on the Site are purchased using Tokens. Tokens are sold in packages (e.g., Starter Spark, Momentum Pack, Elite Performance) or custom amounts.

Tokens are a limited license to use digital features of our Site. They are not cryptocurrency, financial instruments, or real money. Tokens are non-transferable and cannot be redeemed for cash, returned for a refund (except where required by law), or exchanged outside of the Service.
Unless otherwise stated, Tokens do not expire as long as your Account remains active. However, we reserve the right to cancel Tokens if an Account is terminated for violation of these Terms.
All Courses are delivered as downloadable digital files (PDF format).
Available for download in your Account Dashboard.
Sent to the email address associated with your Account.
Typically generated and delivered within minutes of purchase.
These require manual compilation. Delivery times vary based on complexity and Trainer availability, typically ranging from a few hours to several days.
While we strive to meet these timeframes, CHALET AQUARIUS LTD is not liable for technical delays, email delivery failures (e.g., spam filters), or Trainer delays due to high demand.
The content provided by CHALET AQUARIUS LTD, whether AI-generated or Trainer-created, is for educational and informational purposes only. It is not medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
You should consult with a physician or other healthcare professional before starting this or any other fitness program to determine if it is right for your needs.

Participation in any exercise program involves a risk of physical injury. By using our Services, you agree that you do so entirely at your own risk. CHALET AQUARIUS LTD, its officers, employees, and agents shall not be liable for any injury, health impairment, or death arising out of or in connection with the use of our fitness plans.
Upon purchase of a Course, we grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, personal license to download and view the PDF for your personal, non-commercial use.
Resell, redistribute, or share the PDF files with third parties.
Publish the content on other websites or social media.
Remove any copyright or proprietary notices from the files.
All content, site design, logos, and software are the intellectual property of CHALET AQUARIUS LTD.
We accept payments via Visa and MasterCard.
We process transactions in GBP (£), EUR (€), and USD ($).
Note: Exchange rates are determined by your bank or payment provider if your account currency differs from the transaction currency.
We reserve the right to adjust Token package prices or the Token cost of specific Courses at any time. Such changes will not affect Tokens already purchased or Courses already ordered.

By purchasing Tokens and subsequently exchanging them for a Course (digital content), you acknowledge that the Service begins immediately. Under the Consumer Contracts Regulations 2013 and Consumer Rights Act 2015, you consent to the immediate performance of the contract and acknowledge that you thereby lose your right of withdrawal (cooling-off period) once the content has been made available for download or sent to your email.
Refunds for unused Token packages may be requested within 14 days of the original transaction date.
If any Tokens from a package have been used to purchase a Course, the entire package is considered "used" and is non-refundable.
If a file is corrupted or technically defective, please contact support. We will provide a replacement file. If a replacement is not possible, we may refund the Tokens used for that specific file.

To the fullest extent permitted by law, CHALET AQUARIUS LTD shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, resulting from your access to or use of or inability to access or use the Service.

Our total liability for any claim arising out of or relating to these Terms or our Services, regardless of the form of the action, is limited to the amount paid by you to us for the Service in the 12 months preceding the claim.

You are responsible for ensuring that you have the necessary hardware (computer, smartphone) and software (PDF reader) to access and view the Courses. We are not liable for incompatibility issues related to your specific device.
These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of England and Wales.
Any disputes arising under or in connection with these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of London, England.
If you have questions regarding these Terms, payment issues, or technical support, please contact us:

How fast will I receive a coach course?
Coach courses are delivered by your coach. Delivery time depends on your coach's schedule and course complexity.
What's the difference between Coach Course and Instant AI?
Coach Course is delivered by your coach with personalized expertise. Instant AI is generated in minutes.
Refund eligibility depends on your order status and delivery stage. Please read our Refund Policy.
What payment methods do you support?
100 tokens = €1.00 / £0.87 / $1.19. You spend tokens when requesting coach courses or generating instant AI courses.
We include injury-safe options and alternatives, but this is not medical advice. Consult a healthcare professional before starting.
Most workouts can be done with minimal equipment. We provide alternatives for different setups.
We recommend 3-4 sessions per week for optimal results, but you can adjust based on your schedule and goals.
What is a coach course request?
A coach course request lets you ask a coach to create a personalized training plan for you. The coach will design a structured program based on your goals, level, and preferences.
100 tokens = €1.00 / £0.87 / $1.19. You spend tokens when requesting coach courses or generating instant AI courses. Tokens never expire.
Can I use Instant AI instead?
Yes. Instant AI generates a course in minutes, while coach courses are personalized by your coach. Both options are available on the platform.
Where can I see my requests?
You can track all your coach course requests in your dashboard. You'll see the status, updates, and can manage your requests there.
Browse coaches or open the generator. If you want coach guidance, request a plan from a coach profile.
What's the difference between Coach requests and Instant AI?
Coach requests are tailored by a coach-led workflow. Instant AI generates a plan immediately based on your inputs.
You can browse pages without an account. You'll need to sign in to generate, purchase tokens, and access your dashboard.
How do I choose a coach?
Use filters and look for specialties that match your goal. Open the coach profile to see focus areas and ratings.
What do I send in a coach request?
Share your goal, level, training type, equipment, and schedule. The more context you provide, the better the plan.
Yes. Each request is a separate plan and is priced based on your selections.
Yes. You can bookmark coaches to revisit them later.
How does the Instant AI generator work?
Select your goal and training preferences, generate a preview, then publish a full plan.
A preview lets you see the plan structure before publishing. Previews cost 50 tokens.
Yes. You can adjust inputs and generate again until you're happy with the result.
Does Instant AI replace a coach?
It's a fast option when you need speed. Coaches are best when you want guidance and accountability.
Tokens are your balance used across features like previews, publishing, and coach requests.
100 tokens = €1.00 | £0.87 | $1.19. EUR is the base currency.
Can I use the same tokens for both flows?
Yes. One token balance works across coach requests and Instant AI.
What happens if I don't have enough tokens?
You'll be prompted to top up before completing the action.
Yes. Payments are processed via secure checkout. We do not store your full card details.
Where can I see my token balance?
In your dashboard after signing in.
Where do I find my plans?
Your dashboard contains your generated plans and coach requests.
I can't sign in. What should I do?
Check your email address and try again. If the issue persists, contact support.
No. Training guidance is informational and not a substitute for licensed medical care.
Yes. Choose beginner options, start conservatively, and progress gradually.
Stop if you feel sharp pain, dizziness, numbness, or anything unsafe. Consult a professional if needed.
Refund eligibility depends on the situation and service used. See our refund policy for details.
Where can I read the refund policy?
You can read it on our refunds page.
Bir koç programını ne kadar hızlı alırım?
Koç programları koçunuz tarafından hazırlanır. Teslim süresi, koçunuzun takvimine ve programın karmaşıklığına bağlıdır.
Koç Programı ile Instant AI arasındaki fark nedir?
Koç Programı, koçunuzun kişiselleştirilmiş uzmanlığıyla hazırlanır. Instant AI ise dakikalar içinde oluşturulur.
Geri ödeme uygunluğu sipariş durumunuza ve teslimat aşamasına bağlıdır. Lütfen İade Politikamızı okuyun.
100 token = €1.00 / £0.87 / $1.19. Koç programı talep ederken veya instant AI programları üretirken token harcarsınız.
Sakatlık riskini azaltan seçenekler ve alternatifler sunuyoruz, ancak bu tıbbi tavsiye değildir. Başlamadan önce bir sağlık uzmanına danışın.
Antrenmanların çoğu minimum ekipmanla yapılabilir. Farklı kurulumlar için alternatifler sunuyoruz.
En iyi sonuçlar için haftada 3-4 seans öneriyoruz, ancak bunu takviminize ve hedeflerinize göre ayarlayabilirsiniz.

Koç programı talebi, bir koçtan sizin için kişiselleştirilmiş bir antrenman planı hazırlamasını istemenizi sağlar. Koç, hedeflerinize, seviyenize ve tercihlerinize göre yapılandırılmış bir program tasarlar.
100 token = €1.00 / £0.87 / $1.19. Koç programı talep ederken veya instant AI programları üretirken token harcarsınız. Tokenların süresi dolmaz.
Bunun yerine Instant AI kullanabilir miyim?
Evet. Instant AI dakikalar içinde bir program üretir, koç programları ise koçunuz tarafından kişiselleştirilir. Platformda her iki seçenek de mevcuttur.
Tüm koç programı taleplerinizi panelinizde takip edebilirsiniz. Durumu ve güncellemeleri görür, taleplerinizi oradan yönetirsiniz.
Koçlara göz atın veya oluşturucuyu açın. Koç desteği istiyorsanız bir koç profilinden plan talep edin.
Koç talepleri ile Instant AI arasındaki fark nedir?
Koç talepleri, koç liderliğinde yürüyen bir süreçle hazırlanır. Instant AI ise girdilerinize göre planı hemen üretir.
Sayfalara hesap olmadan göz atabilirsiniz. Plan üretmek, token satın almak ve panelinize erişmek için giriş yapmanız gerekir.
Filtreleri kullanın ve hedefinize uyan uzmanlık alanlarını arayın. Odak alanlarını ve puanları görmek için koç profilini açın.
Hedefinizi, seviyenizi, antrenman türünü, ekipmanınızı ve programınızı paylaşın. Ne kadar çok bağlam verirseniz plan o kadar iyi olur.
Birden fazla plan talep edebilir miyim?
Evet. Her talep ayrı bir plandır ve seçiminize göre fiyatlandırılır.
Evet. Koçları daha sonra tekrar ziyaret etmek için yer imlerine ekleyebilirsiniz.
Hedefinizi ve antrenman tercihlerinizi seçin, önizleme oluşturun ve ardından tam planı yayınlayın.
Önizleme, yayınlamadan önce plan yapısını görmenizi sağlar. Önizlemeler 50 token tutar.
Evet. Sonuçtan memnun olana kadar girdileri ayarlayıp yeniden oluşturabilirsiniz.
Instant AI bir koçun yerini alır mı?
Hıza ihtiyacınız olduğunda iyi bir seçenektir. Rehberlik ve sorumluluk istiyorsanız koçlar daha uygundur.
Tokenlar; önizleme, yayınlama ve koç talepleri gibi özelliklerde kullanılan bakiyenizdir.
Aynı tokenları iki akışta da kullanabilir miyim?
Evet. Tek bir token bakiyesi hem koç taleplerinde hem de Instant AI'da çalışır.
İşlemi tamamlamadan önce bakiye yüklemeniz istenir.
Evet. Ödemeler güvenli ödeme akışı üzerinden işlenir. Tam kart bilgilerinizi saklamıyoruz.
Paneliniz, oluşturduğunuz planları ve koç taleplerini içerir.
E-posta adresinizi kontrol edip tekrar deneyin. Sorun devam ederse destekle iletişime geçin.
Hayır. Antrenman rehberi bilgilendirme amaçlıdır ve lisanslı tıbbi bakımın yerine geçmez.
Bu yeni başlayanlar için uygun mu?
Evet. Başlangıç seçeneklerini seçin, yavaş başlayın ve kademeli ilerleyin.
Keskin ağrı, baş dönmesi, uyuşma veya güvensiz hissettiğiniz bir durum olursa durun. Gerekirse bir uzmana danışın.
Geri ödeme uygunluğu duruma ve kullanılan hizmete bağlıdır. Ayrıntılar için iade politikamıza bakın.

Learn what tokens are and how they work as your training balance.
Tokens are your training balance. You top up once and spend tokens on features.
They keep pricing consistent across different plan types and options.
100 tokens = €1.00 | £0.87 | $1.19. You top up your balance once and spend tokens on coach requests or Instant AI plans.
Tokens remain in your balance until used. There is no expiration date.
Your token balance is available in your dashboard when signed in.
You can also see it in the header after signing in.
Understanding token exchange rates and currency options.
EUR is the base currency. Your selected currency is shown in the header.
You can view prices in EUR, GBP, or USD. Select your preferred currency in the header dropdown.
All token calculations are based on EUR, then converted to your selected currency.
Step-by-step guide to adding tokens to your balance.
Choose a pack or enter a custom amount
Tokens are added to your balance after successful payment
You can use the same balance for both Instant AI and coach requests.
Understanding token packages and custom amounts.
We offer three preset packs: Starter Spark (10,000 tokens), Momentum Pack (20,000 tokens), and Elite Performance (30,000 tokens).
Each pack is designed for different usage levels.
You can also enter a custom amount. Tokens are calculated based on your selected currency.
Custom amounts are rounded to the nearest 10 tokens for consistency.
Quick overview of refund eligibility and process.
Refund eligibility depends on the situation and the service used.
Please review our refund policy for details and eligibility.
Understanding the coach request process from start to finish.
Coach requests are personalized plans created by certified coaches based on your specific goals and preferences.
You fill out a form with your level, training type, equipment, and days per week.
How coach request pricing is calculated
Understanding the cost breakdown for coach requests.
Coach request pricing starts at 10,000 tokens base cost.
Additional costs depend on your selections.
Days per week: 4 days (+4,000), 5 days (+8,000), 6 days (+12,000)
Tips for a better coach request
Best practices for getting the most out of your coach request.
Provide clear information about your goals, current fitness level, and available equipment.
The more details you share, the better your personalized plan will be.
Browse coach profiles to find someone whose expertise matches your goals.
Read their specialties and focus areas before making a request.
Requesting a plan from a coach profile
How to request a plan directly from a coach's profile page.
You can request a plan directly from any coach's profile page.
Click the 'Request plan' button on the coach profile.
How Instant AI previews work (50 tokens)
Understanding the preview feature and its cost.
Instant AI previews let you see a sample of your plan before committing to the full cost.
Preview costs 50 tokens and shows you a glimpse of what your plan will look like.
Decide to publish or make changes
How to publish your Instant AI plan after preview.
After previewing your plan, you can publish it to get the complete version.
Publishing costs depend on your selected options (weeks, workout types, muscle groups).
Understanding factors that influence Instant AI plan pricing.
Instant AI plan costs depend on several factors related to your selections.
How to sign in and access your account.
Sign in to access your dashboard, view your plans, and manage your token balance.
If you don't have an account, click 'Create account' to sign up.
Where to find your plans in the dashboard
Locating your coach requests and Instant AI plans.
All your plans, both coach requests and Instant AI plans, are available in your Dashboard.
You can view, download, and track your progress there.
How to view your token balance and transaction history.
Your token balance is visible in the header after signing in.
You can also see detailed balance and transaction history in your dashboard.
View all your token transactions, including top-ups and spending, in the dashboard.
Each transaction shows the date, amount, and reason.
What to do if your plan generation is taking too long.
If generation seems stuck or is taking longer than expected, try these steps.
Wait a moment - complex plans can take time
Contact support if the issue persists
If you're experiencing payment issues, here are common solutions.
Payment declined - check your card details and available funds
Checkout not loading - try refreshing or using a different browser
Tokens not added - contact support with your transaction ID
If you see loading issues or blank states, try these fixes.
Our plans are designed to help you train safely, but you should always consult with a healthcare professional before starting any new exercise program.
Consult a healthcare professional before starting
Listen to your body and stop if you feel pain
